comment: Reviewed, time-bounded exceptions consumed by scripts/audit-gate.ts (TASK-100). threshold: the gate FAILS on any advisory at or above this severity that is NOT listed here. Each entry expires and must be re-reviewed. See security/dependency-audit.md for the full triage.

entries.reason: Dev/build/test-only transitive dependency. The published VSIX bundles only dist/ (esbuild) and ships no node_modules, so this package is never installed for end users and is unreachable at extension/MCP runtime.

Dev/build/test-only transitive dependency. The published VSIX bundles only dist/ (esbuild) and ships no node_modules, so this package is never installed for end users and is unreachable at extension/MCP runtime.

Dev/build/test-only transitive dependency. The published VSIX bundles only dist/ (esbuild) and ships no node_modules, so this package is never installed for end users and is unreachable at extension/MCP runtime.

Present via @modelcontextprotocol/sdk, but the Taskwright MCP server uses the stdio transport with no HTTP server, rate-limiter, or subprocess-spawn path, so this transitive code is not bundled into dist/ nor reachable at runtime.

Reachable in the webview via mermaid, which processes the user's own board/task content inside a CSP-restricted VS Code webview (no third-party/attacker input). Low practical impact; highest-priority to remediate when mermaid ships a patched transitive.

Dev/build/test-only transitive dependency. The published VSIX bundles only dist/ (esbuild) and ships no node_modules, so this package is never installed for end users and is unreachable at extension/MCP runtime.

Present via @modelcontextprotocol/sdk, but the Taskwright MCP server uses the stdio transport with no HTTP server, rate-limiter, or subprocess-spawn path, so this transitive code is not bundled into dist/ nor reachable at runtime.

The direct js-yaml@4.x is NOT affected (advisory range <3.15.0). The vulnerable js-yaml@3.x is transitive via gray-matter, which parses the user's own task-file frontmatter. DoS-only, own content, no attacker input.
